title: He spent about twenty-one hours in space

data.en: My father, Yang Liwei, is a taikonaut, and he is very famous.
data.cn: 我的父亲杨利伟是一名宇航员，他非常有名。
accept: My father, Yang Liwei, is very famous and he is a taikonaut.

data.en: In October 2003, my father flew into space in Shenzhou V.
data.cn: 2003年10月，我的父亲乘坐神舟五号飞入太空。

data.en: He spent about twenty-one hours in space.
data.cn: 他在太空度过了大约二十一个小时。
accept: In space he spent about twenty-one hours.

data.en: He did a lot of work there.
data.cn: 他在那里做了很多工作。
accept: There he did a lot of work.

data.en: He also made a video in space.
data.cn: 他还在太空制作了一段视频。
accept: In space he also made a video.

data.en: Then he came back to the earth.
data.cn: 然后他回到了地球。

data.en: It was a great day!
data.cn: 那是伟大的一天！

data.en: I was very proud of him.
data.cn: 我为他感到非常自豪。

data.en: Now he still tells me about his space travel.
data.cn: 现在他仍然告诉我关于他的太空旅行。
accept: He still tells me about his space travel now.

data.en: I want to go into space someday too.
data.cn: 我也想有朝一日进入太空。
accept: I too want to go into space someday.

data.en: My mother and I went to the airport to meet my father.
data.cn: 我妈妈和我去机场接我父亲。
accept: I and my mother went to the airport to meet my father.

data.en: We were very happy.
data.cn: 我们非常高兴。

data.en: Shenzhou V flew into space and Yang Liwei was in it.
data.cn: 神舟五号飞入太空，杨利伟就在里面。
accept: Yang Liwei was in it and Shenzhou V flew into space.

data.en: Yang Liwei made a video in space and lots of people watched it.
data.cn: 杨利伟在太空制作了视频，很多人观看了它。

data.en: Yang Liwei's family met him at the airport and they were happy.
data.cn: 杨利伟的家人在机场迎接他，他们很高兴。
accept: They were happy and Yang Liwei's family met him at the airport.

data.en: Look up at the spaceship flying in the sky.
data.cn: 抬头看那艘在天空中飞行的宇宙飞船。

data.en: Shenzhou went into space and made a loud sound.
data.cn: 神舟进入太空并发出了巨大的声响。

data.en: It went to a new place and travelled round and round.
data.cn: 它去了一个新的地方，并一圈又一圈地航行。

data.en: Inside the spaceship, there was a Chinese man.
data.cn: 在宇宙飞船内部，有一位中国人。
accept: There was a Chinese man inside the spaceship.

data.en: I want to meet him and I want to shake his hand!
data.cn: 我想见他，我想和他握手！

data.en: Helen Keller was born in the US in 1880.
data.cn: 海伦·凯勒1880年出生于美国。
accept: In 1880 Helen Keller was born in the US.

data.en: As a baby, she became blind and deaf.
data.cn: 还是个婴儿时，她变得又盲又聋。
accept: She became blind and deaf as a baby.

data.en: She couldn't see or hear.
data.cn: 她看不见也听不见。
data.hint: Couldn't is the past of can't.
accept: She couldn't hear or see.

data.en: Helen couldn't see but she could read.
data.cn: 海伦看不见，但她能阅读。
accept: She could read but Helen couldn't see.

data.en: Helen couldn't hear but she could talk.
data.cn: 海伦听不见，但她会说话。
accept: She could talk but Helen couldn't hear.

data.en: Helen had a teacher.
data.cn: 海伦有一位老师。

data.en: She drew letters in Helen's hand and taught her to spell.
data.cn: 她在海伦手中画字母并教她拼写。
accept: She taught her to spell and drew letters in Helen's hand.

data.en: Later Helen learnt to read, write and speak.
data.cn: 后来海伦学会了读、写和说。
data.hint: Learnt is the past of learn.
accept: Later Helen learnt to speak, read and write.

data.en: She wrote a book about herself and travelled all over the world.
data.cn: 她写了一本关于她自己的书，并周游了世界。
accept: She travelled all over the world and wrote a book about herself.

data.en: Helen lived to be eighty-seven.
data.cn: 海伦活到了八十七岁。

data.en: She is a role model for blind people.
data.cn: 她是盲人们的榜样。

data.en: She is also a role model for you and me.
data.cn: 她也是你和我的榜样。
accept: For you and me, she is also a role model.

data.en: She could also read, write and speak.
data.cn: 她也能读、写和说。
data.hint: Could is the past of can.
accept: She could also speak, write and read.

data.en: Did you buy me a pencil?
data.cn: 你给我买铅笔了吗？

data.en: Yes, I bought you a pen.
data.cn: 是的，我给你买了一支钢笔。
accept: I bought you a pen, yes.

data.en: I spent three hours there.
data.cn: 我在那里待了三个小时。
accept: There I spent three hours.

data.en: I saw lots of animals.
data.cn: 我看到了很多动物。
accept: Lots of animals I saw.

data.en: Did you go to a zoo?
data.cn: 你去了动物园吗？

data.en: No, I didn't.
data.cn: 不，我没去。

data.en: Yes, I did.
data.cn: 是的，我去了。

data.en: Who is he?
data.cn: 他是谁？

data.en: He is Confucius.
data.cn: 他是孔子。

data.en: When was he born?
data.cn: 他是什么时候出生的？

data.en: He was born in five hundred and fifty-one BC.
data.cn: 他出生于公元前551年。
accept: In five hundred and fifty-one BC he was born.

data.en: He was a great teacher.
data.cn: 他是一位伟大的老师。

data.en: He had many students.
data.cn: 他有很多学生。

data.en: He lived to be seventy-two.
data.cn: 他活到了七十二岁。

data.en: I want to go into space and see the earth.
data.cn: 我想进入太空看看地球。
accept: I want to see the earth and go into space.

data.en: She wrote a book about her life.
data.cn: 她写了一本关于她生活的书。

data.en: He still tells me about his space travel.
data.cn: 他仍然告诉我关于他的太空旅行。
accept: His space travel, he still tells me about.
